package.sql: SELECT q.studyqueue_key AS STUDYQUEUE_KEY, q.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, q.match_stat AS MATCH_STAT, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.modalities AS MODALITIES, s.department AS DEPARTMENT, m.scheduled_station AS SCHEDULED_STATION, s.source_aetitle AS SOURCE_AETITLE, m.scheduled_location AS SCHEDULED_LOCATION, TO_CHAR(m.scheduled_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SCHEDULED_DTTM, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, TO_CHAR(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, s.study_desc AS STUDY_DESC, s.bodyparts AS BODYPARTS, m.scheduled_proc_status AS SCHEDULED_PROC_STATUS, m.scheduled_proc_id AS SCHEDULED_PROC_ID, m.scheduled_proc_desc AS SCHEDULED_PROC_DESC, m.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, m.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, m.admission_id AS ADMISSION_ID, NVL(s.series_count, 0) AS SERIES_COUNT, NVL(s.instance_count, 0) AS INSTANCE_COUNT FROM study s, mwl m, (SELECT /*+ INDEX (STUDYQUEUE STUDYQUEUE_STAT_KEY_IDX) */ studyqueue_key AS STUDYQUEUE_KEY, DECODE(study_key, null, 0, study_key) AS STUDY_KEY, DECODE(study_key, null, 'U', 'M') AS MATCH_STAT, 0 AS RETRY_COUNT FROM studyQueue WHERE queue_stat = 'N' AND DECODE(study_key, null, 'U', 'M') = 'M' ORDER BY studyqueue_key ASC) q WHERE s.study_key IN q.study_key AND m.accession_no = s.access_no AND m.patient_id = s.patient_id AND s.validate_dttm IS NOT NULL ORDER BY q.studyqueue_key ASC

SELECT q.studyqueue_key AS STUDYQUEUE_KEY, q.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, q.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, q.match_stat AS MATCH_STAT, patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, accession_no AS ACCESSION_NO, scheduled_modality AS SCHEDULED_MODALITY, request_department AS REQUEST_DEPARTMENT, scheduled_station AS SCHEDULED_STATION, scheduled_location AS SCHEDULED_LOCATION, TO_CHAR(scheduled_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SCHEDULED_DTTM, patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, TO_CHAR(imaging_request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS IMAGING_REQUEST_DTTM, scheduled_proc_status AS PATIENT_LOCATION, scheduled_proc_id AS SCHEDULED_PROC_ID, scheduled_proc_desc AS SCHEDULED_PROC_DESC, patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, admission_id AS ADMISSION_ID FROM mwl m, (SELECT studyQueue_key AS STUDYQUEUE_KEY, DECODE(study_key, null, 0, study_key) AS STUDY_KEY, study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, DECODE(study_key, null, 'U', 'M') AS MATCH_STAT, queue_stat AS QUEUE_STAT, 0 AS RETRY_COUNT FROM studyQueue WHERE queue_stat = 'N' AND DECODE(study_key, null, 'U', 'M') = 'U' ORDER BY studyqueue_key ASC) q WHERE m.study_instance_uid IN q.study_instance_uid ORDER BY q.studyqueue_key ASC
UPDATE studyqueue SET queue_stat = 'Y', replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE studyqueue_key = @STUDYQUEUE_KEY
UPDATE studyqueue SET queue_stat = 'E', replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE studyqueue_key = @STUDYQUEUE_KEY

SELECT r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, c.userid AS CREATOR_ID, c.user_name AS CREATOR_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.create_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CREATE_DTTM, d.userid AS DICTATOR_ID, d.user_name AS DICTATOR_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.dictate_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DICTATE_DTTM, t.userid AS TRANSCRIBER_ID, t.user_name AS TRANSCRIBER_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.transcribe_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRANSCRIBE_DTTM, a.userid AS APPROVER_ID, a.user_name AS APPROVER_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.approval_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVAL_DTTM, v.userid AS REVISER_ID, v.user_name AS REVISER_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.revision_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REVISION_DTTM, r.report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, r.report_text_lob AS REPORT_TEXT_LOB, r.report_buffer_lob AS REPORT_BUFFER_LOB, r.conclusion AS CONCLUSION, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, m.scheduled_location AS SCHEDULED_LOCATION, s.department AS DEPARTMENT, s.modalities AS MODALITIES, TO_CHAR(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_doctor AS REQUEST_DOCTOR, s.perform_doctor AS PERFORM_DOCTOR, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR, TO_CHAR(m.scheduled_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SCHEDULED_DTTM, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, TO_CHAR(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, m.admission_id AS ADMISSION_ID, s.study_comments AS STUDY_COMMENTS, s.study_reason AS STUDY_REASON, m.attend_doctor AS ATTEND_DOCTOR, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, m.scheduled_station AS SCHEDULED_STATION, s.specialty AS SPECIALTY FROM report r, study s, mwl m, users c, users d, users t, users a, users v, reportQueue q WHERE r.report_key = q.report_key AND s.study_key = r.study_key AND s.access_no = m.accession_no AND s.study_stat > 200 AND s.validate_dttm IS NOT NULL AND s.patient_id = m.patient_id AND r.creator_key = c.user_key(+) AND r.dictator_key = d.user_key(+) AND r.transcriber_key = t.user_key(+) AND r.approver_key = a.user_key(+) AND r.reviser_key = v.user_key(+)
DELETE FROM reportQueue WHERE report_key = @REPORT_KEY

SELECT q.max_extension_key AS MAX_EXTENSION_KEY, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, c.userid AS CREATOR_ID, c.user_name AS CREATOR_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.create_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CREATE_DTTM, d.userid AS DICTATOR_ID, d.user_name AS DICTATOR_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.dictate_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DICTATE_DTTM, t.userid AS TRANSCRIBER_ID, t.user_name AS TRANSCRIBER_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.transcribe_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRANSCRIBE_DTTM, a.userid AS APPROVER_ID, a.user_name AS APPROVER_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.approval_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVAL_DTTM, v.userid AS REVISER_ID, v.user_name AS REVISER_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.revision_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REVISION_DTTM, r.report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, r.report_text_lob AS REPORT_TEXT_LOB, r.report_buffer_lob AS REPORT_BUFFER_LOB, r.conclusion AS CONCLUSION, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, m.scheduled_location AS SCHEDULED_LOCATION, s.department AS DEPARTMENT, s.modalities AS MODALITIES, TO_CHAR(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_doctor AS REQUEST_DOCTOR, s.perform_doctor AS PERFORM_DOCTOR, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR, TO_CHAR(m.scheduled_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SCHEDULED_DTTM, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, TO_CHAR(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, m.admission_id AS ADMISSION_ID, s.study_comments AS STUDY_COMMENTS, s.study_reason AS STUDY_REASON, m.attend_doctor AS ATTEND_DOCTOR, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, m.scheduled_station AS SCHEDULED_STATION, s.specialty AS specialty FROM report r, study s, mwl m, users c, users d, users t, users a, users v, (SELECT report_key, MAX(extension_key) AS max_extension_key FROM reportQueue WHERE report_key >= 1 AND rownum <= 50 GROUP BY report_key) q WHERE r.report_key = q.report_key AND s.study_key = r.study_key AND s.access_no = m.accession_no AND s.study_stat > 200 AND s.validate_dttm IS NOT NULL AND s.patient_id = m.patient_id AND r.creator_key = c.user_key(+) AND r.dictator_key = d.user_key(+) AND r.transcriber_key = t.user_key(+) AND r.approver_key = a.user_key(+) AND r.reviser_key = v.user_key(+)

SELECT q.max_extension_key AS MAX_EXTENSION_KEY, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, c.userid AS CREATOR_ID, c.user_name AS CREATOR_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.create_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CREATE_DTTM, d.userid AS DICTATOR_ID, d.user_name AS DICTATOR_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.dictate_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DICTATE_DTTM, t.userid AS TRANSCRIBER_ID, t.user_name AS TRANSCRIBER_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.transcribe_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRANSCRIBE_DTTM, a.userid AS APPROVER_ID, a.user_name AS APPROVER_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.approval_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVAL_DTTM, v.userid AS REVISER_ID, v.user_name AS REVISER_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.revision_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REVISION_DTTM, r.report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, (SELECT readingheaderdata FROM readingHeader WHERE study_key IN (SELECT study_key FROM study WHERE study_instance_uid = s.study_instance_uid)) || CHR(13) || CHR(10) || r.report_text_lob AS REPORT_TEXT_LOB, r.report_buffer_lob AS REPORT_BUFFER_LOB, r.conclusion AS CONCLUSION, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, m.scheduled_location AS SCHEDULED_LOCATION, s.department AS DEPARTMENT, s.modalities AS MODALITIES, TO_CHAR(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_doctor AS REQUEST_DOCTOR, s.perform_doctor AS PERFORM_DOCTOR, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR, TO_CHAR(m.scheduled_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SCHEDULED_DTTM, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, TO_CHAR(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, m.admission_id AS ADMISSION_ID, s.study_comments AS STUDY_COMMENTS, s.study_reason AS STUDY_REASON, m.attend_doctor AS ATTEND_DOCTOR, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, m.scheduled_station AS SCHEDULED_STATION, s.specialty AS SPECIALTY FROM report r, study s, mwl m, users c, users d, users t, users a, users v, (SELECT report_key, MAX(extension_key) AS max_extension_key FROM reportQueue WHERE report_key >= 1 AND rownum <= 50 GROUP BY report_key) q WHERE r.report_key = q.report_key AND s.study_key = r.study_key AND s.access_no = m.accession_no AND s.study_stat > 200 AND s.validate_dttm IS NOT NULL AND s.patient_id = m.patient_id AND r.creator_key = c.user_key(+) AND r.dictator_key = d.user_key(+) AND r.transcriber_key = t.user_key(+) AND r.approver_key = a.user_key(+) AND r.reviser_key = v.user_key(+)

SELECT q.max_extension_key AS MAX_EXTENSION_KEY, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, c.userid AS CREATOR_ID, c.user_name AS CREATOR_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.create_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CREATE_DTTM, d.userid AS DICTATOR_ID, d.user_name AS DICTATOR_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.dictate_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DICTATE_DTTM, t.userid AS TRANSCRIBER_ID, t.user_name AS TRANSCRIBER_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.transcribe_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRANSCRIBE_DTTM, a.userid AS APPROVER_ID, a.user_name AS APPROVER_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.approval_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVAL_DTTM, v.userid AS REVISER_ID, v.user_name AS REVISER_NAME, TO_CHAR(r.revision_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REVISION_DTTM, r.report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, (SELECT readingheaderdata FROM readingHeader WHERE study_key IN (SELECT study_key FROM study WHERE study_instance_uid = s.study_instance_uid)) || r.report_text_lob AS REPORT_TEXT_LOB, r.report_buffer_lob AS REPORT_BUFFER_LOB, r.conclusion AS CONCLUSION, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, m.scheduled_location AS SCHEDULED_LOCATION, s.department AS DEPARTMENT, s.modalities AS MODALITIES, TO_CHAR(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_doctor AS REQUEST_DOCTOR, s.perform_doctor AS PERFORM_DOCTOR, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR, TO_CHAR(m.scheduled_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SCHEDULED_DTTM, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, TO_CHAR(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, m.admission_id AS ADMISSION_ID, s.study_comments AS STUDY_COMMENTS, s.study_reason AS STUDY_REASON, m.attend_doctor AS ATTEND_DOCTOR, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, m.scheduled_station AS SCHEDULED_STATION, s.specialty AS SPECIALTY FROM report r, study s, mwl m, users c, users d, users t, users a, users v, (SELECT report_key, MAX(extension_key) AS MAX_EXTENSION_KEY FROM reportQueue WHERE report_key >= 1 AND rownum <= 50 GROUP BY report_key) q WHERE r.report_key = q.report_key AND s.study_key = r.study_key AND s.access_no = m.accession_no AND s.study_stat > 200 AND s.validate_dttm IS NOT NULL AND s.patient_id = m.patient_id AND r.creator_key = c.user_key(+) AND r.dictator_key = d.user_key(+) AND r.transcriber_key = t.user_key(+) AND r.approver_key = a.user_key(+) AND r.reviser_key = v.user_key(+)
DELETE FROM reportQueue WHERE report_key = @REPORT_KEY AND extension_key <= @MAX_EXTENSION_KEY

DECLARE v_pat_key NUMBER; v_encounter_key NUMBER; BEGIN v_pat_key := sp_mapper.put_patient( 'ADT^A04', -- event_type @PID.PATIENT_ID, -- patient_id null, -- prior_patient_id @PID.ID_ISSUER_CODE, -- patient_id_issuer_code null, -- patient_ssn @PID.FULL_NAME, -- patient_name null, -- last_name null, -- first_name null, -- middle_name null, -- prefix null, -- suffix null, -- marital_stat null, -- confidentiality @PID.DATE_OF_BIRTH, -- patient_birth_dttm null, -- patient_death_dttm @PID.ADMINISTRATIVE_SEX, -- patient_sex null, -- patient_size null, -- patient_weight null, -- blood_type_abo null, -- blood_type_rh null, -- citizenship null, -- occupation null, -- race_code null, -- language_code null, -- religion_code null, -- birthplace null, -- multiple_birth_status null, -- birth_order null, -- email null, -- phone_no null, -- pregnancy_code null, -- patient_stat null, -- account_no null, -- contact_type null, -- home_phone_no null, -- busi_phone_no null, -- fax_no null, -- address null, -- city null, -- state null, -- country null, -- zipcode null, -- visit_number null, -- visit_stat null, -- admit_dttm null, -- discharge_dttm null, -- patient_location null, -- patient_residence null, -- refer_doctor_id null, -- consult_doctor_id null, -- institution_code null, -- visit_comment null, -- admit_route null, -- lastmen_strual_dttm null, -- pregnancy_status null, -- code_abbreviation null, -- station_code null, -- english_name null, -- ethnic_group null, -- current_department null, -- refer_doctor_name null, -- consult_doctor_name null, -- broker_aetitle 'HL7-PACS' -- broker_type );
IF v_pat_key > 0 THEN v_encounter_key := sp_mapper.put_encounter( 'ENCOUNTER', -- event_type @PID.PATIENT_ID, -- patient_id null, -- prior_patient_id @PID.ID_ISSUER_CODE, -- patient_id_issuer_code @PID.FULL_NAME, -- patient_name null, -- other_patient_id null, -- other_patient_name @PID.DATE_OF_BIRTH, -- patient_birth_dttm @PID.ADMINISTRATIVE_SEX, -- patient_sex null, -- patient_location null, -- patient_residency null, -- department null, -- attend_doctor_id null, -- refer_doctor_id null, -- consult_doctor_id null, -- visit_number TO_CHAR(SYSDATE,'yyyyMMddHH24mmss'), -- admit_dttm null -- discharge_dttm ); END IF; END;

SELECT 'ORF' AS MESSAGE_TYPE, 'R04' AS EVENT_TYPE, 'ORF_R04' AS MESSAGE_STRUCTURE, 'R' AS OBJECT_TYPE, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CURRENT_DTTM, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, r.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, NVL(r.alink_key, 0) AS ALINK_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS EXAM_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, c.userid AS CREATE_USERID, c.user_name AS CREATE_USERNAME, TO_CHAR(r.create_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CREATE_DTTM, d.userid AS DICTATE_USERID, d.user_name AS dictate_username, TO_CHAR(r.dictate_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DICTATE_DTTM, t.userid AS TRANSCRIBE_USERID, t.user_name AS trancribe_username, TO_CHAR(r.transcribe_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRANSCRIBE_DTTM, a.userid AS APPROVE_USERID, a.user_name AS APPROVE_USERNAME, a.last_name AS APPROVE_LASTNAME, a.first_name AS APPROVE_FIRSTNAME, TO_CHAR(r.approval_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVAL_DTTM, v.userid AS REVISE_USERID, v.user_name AS REVISE_USERNAME, TO_CHAR(r.revision_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REVISION_DTTM, r.report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, r.report_text_lob AS REPORT_TEXT, -- sp_mapper.get_report_html(s.access_no) AS REPORT_HTML, r.conclusion AS CONCLUSION, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.institution AS SCHEDULED_LOCATION, s.department AS PERFORM_DEPARTMENT, s.modalities AS PERFORM_MODALITY, TO_CHAR(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_doctor AS REQUEST_DOCTOR, s.perform_doctor AS PERFORM_DOCTOR, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR, ur.last_name AS REFER_DOCTOR_LAST_NAME, ur.first_name AS REFER_DOCTOR_FIRST_NAME, ur.middle_name AS REFER_DOCTOR_MIDDLE_NAME, ur.suffix AS REFER_DOCTOR_SUFFIX, ur.prefix AS REFER_DOCTOR_PREFIX, TO_CHAR(s.scheduled_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SCHEDULED_DTTM, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, p.last_name AS PATIENT_LAST_NAME, p.first_name AS PATIENT_FIRST_NAME, p.middle_name AS PATIENT_MIDDLE_NAME, p.prefix AS PATIENT_PREFIX, p.suffix AS PATIENT_SUFFIX, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, TO_CHAR(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, s.study_id AS ADMISSION_ID, s.study_comments AS STUDY_COMMENTS, s.study_reason AS STUDY_REASON, s.operators AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_NAME, ua.userid AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_ID, ua.last_name AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_LAST_NAME, ua.first_name AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_FIRST_NAME, ua.middle_name AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_MIDDLE_NAME, ua.suffix AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_SUFFIX, ua.prefix AS ATTEND_DOCTOR_PREFIX, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, s.patient_residency AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, s.source_aetitle AS SOURCE_AETITLE, p.account_no AS PATIENT_ACCOUNT_NO FROM report r, study s, users c, users d, users t, users a, users v, patient p, users ur, users ua WHERE s.access_no = @QRF.OTHER_QRY_SUBJECT_FILTER AND s.study_key = r.study_key AND s.patient_id = p.patient_id AND r.creator_key = C.user_key(+) AND r.dictator_key = d.user_key(+) AND r.transcriber_key = t.user_key(+) AND r.approver_key = A.user_key(+) AND r.reviser_key = v.user_key(+) AND s.refer_doctor = ur.user_name(+) AND s.operators = ua.user_name(+)

SELECT q.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, q.event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, q.object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, q.retry_count AS RETRY_COUNT, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CURRENT_DTTM, ms.placer_order_id AS PLACER_ORDER_ID, ms.filler_order_id AS FILLER_ORDER_ID, ms.accession_no AS EXAM_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, mp.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, mp.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, TO_CHAR(mp.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, mp.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, s.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.modalities AS PERFORM_MODALITY, s.source_aetitle AS SOURCE_AETITLE, (SELECT userid FROM users WHERE user_key = o.order_doctor_key) AS ORDER_DOCTOR_ID, (SELECT user_name FROM users WHERE user_key = o.order_doctor_key) AS ORDER_DOCTOR_NAME, (SELECT userid FROM users WHERE user_key = m.perform_doctor_key) AS PERFORM_DOCTOR_ID, (SELECT user_name FROM users WHERE user_key = m.perform_doctor_key) AS PERFORM_DOCTOR_NAME FROM study s, mpps mp, mppssps ms, iOrder o, msps m, (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, object_key, event_type, object_type, retry_count FROM (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, event_type, object_type, object_key, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'ORM' AND route_stat = 'N' AND object_type = 'MP' AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE s.study_key IN q.object_key AND mp.mpps_key = ms.mpps_key AND ms.study_key = s.study_key AND m.study_key = s.study_key AND o.order_key = s.order_key ORDER BY q.routeitem_key ASC

SELECT q.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, q.event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, q.object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, q.retry_count AS RETRY_COUNT, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CURRENT_DTTM, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, s.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, s.addendum_stat AS STUDY_ADDENDUM_STAT, TO_CHAR(r.approval_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVAL_DTTM, r.report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, r.report_text_lob AS REPORT_TEXT, SP_MAPPER.GET_ALLREPORTS(r.report_key, 0) AS ALL_REPORT_TEXT, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.modalities AS PERFORM_MODALITY, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR_ID, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, TO_CHAR(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, s.patient_residency AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, v.pathname || '\' || g.pathname || '\' || g.filename AS PDF_FILE_PATH FROM report r, study s, patient p, volume v, generalFileLoc g, pdfConverterQueue pcq, (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, object_key, event_type, object_type, retry_count FROM (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, event_type, object_type, object_key, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'ORU' AND route_stat = 'N' AND object_type in ('R', 'A') AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE r.report_key IN q.object_key AND r.report_key = pcq.report_key(+) AND pcq.convert_stat(+) = 'Y' AND pcq.general_file_key = g.general_file_key(+) AND g.volume_code = v.volume_code(+) AND s.study_key = r.study_key AND s.study_stat > 230 AND s.patient_id_issuer = p.patient_id_issuer AND s.patient_id = p.patient_id ORDER BY q.routeitem_key ASC

SELECT q.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, q.event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, q.object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, q.retry_count AS RETRY_COUNT, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CURRENT_DTTM, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, s.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, s.addendum_stat AS STUDY_ADDENDUM_STAT, TO_CHAR(r.approval_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVAL_DTTM, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.modalities AS PERFORM_MODALITY, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR_ID, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, TO_CHAR(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, s.patient_residency AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, v.pathname || '\' || g.pathname || '\' || g.filename AS PDF_FILE_PATH FROM study s, patient pa, pdfConverterQueue pcq, generalFileLoc g, volume v, report r, (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, object_key, event_type, object_type, pdf_queue_key, retry_count FROM (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, event_type, object_type, object_key, pdf_queue_key, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS retry_count FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'ORU' AND route_stat = 'N' AND object_type = 'PDF' AND pdf_queue_key IS NOT NULL AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE pcq.pdf_queue_key IN q.pdf_queue_key AND pcq.convert_stat = 'Y' AND pcq.general_file_key = g.general_file_key AND g.volume_code = v.volume_code AND pa.patient_id_issuer = s.patient_id_issuer AND pa.patient_id = s.patient_id AND pcq.study_key = s.study_key AND r.report_key = sp_report.lookup_last_report_key(s.study_key) ORDER BY q.routeitem_key ASC

SELECT q.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, q.event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, q.object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, q.retry_count AS RETRY_COUNT, TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CURRENT_DTTM, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, s.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, s.addendum_stat AS STUDY_ADDENDUM_STAT, TO_CHAR(r.approval_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVAL_DTTM, r.report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, r.report_text_lob AS REPORT_TEXT, TO_CHAR(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.modalities AS PERFORM_MODALITY, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR_ID, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, TO_CHAR(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, s.patient_residency AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, r.digital_sign_flag AS DIGITAL_SIGN_FLAG, r.digital_sign_data AS DIGITAL_SIGN_DATA, r.digital_sign_dttm AS DIGITAL_SIGN_DTTM, r.certificate_dn AS CERTIFICATE_DN, r.digital_sign_key AS DIGITAL_SIGN_KEY FROM report r, study s, patient p, (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, object_key, event_type, object_type, retry_count FROM (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, event_type, object_type, object_key, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'ORU' AND route_stat = 'N' AND object_type in ('R', 'A') AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE r.report_key IN q.object_key AND s.study_key = r.study_key AND s.study_stat > 230 AND s.patient_id_issuer = p.patient_id_issuer AND s.patient_id = p.patient_id ORDER BY q.routeitem_key ASC

SELECT q.ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.TRIGGER_DTTM, q.REPLICA_DTTM, q.MESSAGE_TYPE, q.EVENT_TYPE, q.OBJECT_TYPE, q.OBJECT_KEY, q.ROUTE_STAT, q.RETRY_COUNT FROM (SELECT routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, TO_CHAR(trigger_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRIGGER_DTTM, NVL(TO_CHAR(replica_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), null) AS REPLICA_DTTM, message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, object_key AS OBJECT_KEY, route_stat AS ROUTE_STAT, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'MWL' AND route_stat = 'N' AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) q WHERE rownum < 1000

SELECT q.ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.TRIGGER_DTTM, q.REPLICA_DTTM, q.MESSAGE_TYPE, q.EVENT_TYPE, q.OBJECT_TYPE, q.OBJECT_KEY, q.ROUTE_STAT, q.RETRY_COUNT FROM (SELECT routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, TO_CHAR(trigger_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRIGGER_DTTM, NVL(TO_CHAR(replica_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), null) AS REPLICA_DTTM, message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, object_key AS OBJECT_KEY, route_stat AS ROUTE_STAT, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'MFN' AND route_stat = 'N' AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) q WHERE rownum < 1000

SELECT q.ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.TRIGGER_DTTM, q.REPLICA_DTTM, q.MESSAGE_TYPE, q.EVENT_TYPE, q.OBJECT_TYPE, q.OBJECT_KEY, q.ROUTE_STAT, q.RETRY_COUNT FROM (SELECT routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, TO_CHAR(trigger_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRIGGER_DTTM, NVL(TO_CHAR(replica_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), null) AS REPLICA_DTTM, message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, object_key AS PATIENT_ID, route_stat AS ROUTE_STAT, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'ADT' AND event_type = 'A04' AND object_type = 'EBIW' AND route_stat = 'N' AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) q WHERE rownum < 1000
UPDATE hl7routeitem SET route_stat = 'Y', replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE routeitem_key = @ROUTEITEM_KEY
UPDATE hl7routeitem SET route_stat = CASE WHEN NVL(retry_count, 0) >= 2 THEN 'E' ELSE 'N' END, retry_count = NVL(retry_count, 0) + 1, replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE routeitem_key = @ROUTEITEM_KEY

SELECT cvr_key AS CVR_KEY, TO_CHAR(trigger_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRIGGER_DTTM, NVL(TO_CHAR(replica_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), null) AS REPLICA_DTTM, study_key AS STUDY_KEY, access_no AS ACCESS_NO, patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, userid AS USER_ID, memo AS MEMO FROM cvr WHERE replica_dttm IS null ORDER BY cvr_key ASC
UPDATE cvr SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE cvr_key = @CVR_KEY
UPDATE cvr SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE cvr_key = @CVR_KEY

SELECT mwl_key AS MWL_KEY, CASE WHEN scheduled_proc_status = '0' THEN 'CA' -- cancel order WHEN scheduled_proc_status IN ('100', '120') THEN 'NW' -- new order (Ordered or Scheduled) END AS ORDER_CONTROL_ID, RTRIM(event_type) AS EVENT_TYPE, SUBSTR(RTRIM(character_set), 1, 32) AS CHARACTER_SET, SUBSTR(NVL(RTRIM(scheduled_aetitle), 'null'), 1, 16) AS SCHEDULED_AETITLE, SUBSTR(NVL(RTRIM(scheduled_dttm), RTRIM(imaging_request_dttm)), 1, 14) AS SCHEDULED_DTTM, SUBSTR(RTRIM(scheduled_modality), 1, 8) AS SCHEDULED_MODALITY, SUBSTR(RTRIM(scheduled_station), 1, 32) AS SCHEDULED_STATION, SUBSTR(RTRIM(scheduled_location), 1, 32) AS SCHEDULED_LOCATION, SUBSTR(RTRIM(scheduled_proc_id), 1, 32) AS SCHEDULED_PROC_ID, SUBSTR(RTRIM(scheduled_proc_desc), 1, 64) AS SCHEDULED_PROC_DESC, CASE WHEN scheduled_action_codes IS null THEN NVL(RTRIM(scheduled_proc_id), 'null') ELSE SUBSTR(sp_util.parse_string(RTRIM(scheduled_action_codes), ':', 1), 1, 32) END AS SCHEDULED_ACTION_CODES, SUBSTR(RTRIM(scheduled_proc_status), 1, 32) AS SCHEDULED_PROC_STATUS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(premedication), 1, 32) AS PREMEDICATION, SUBSTR(RTRIM(contrast_agent), 1, 32) AS CONTRAST_AGENT, SUBSTR(RTRIM(requested_proc_id), 1, 32) AS REQUESTED_PROC_ID, SUBSTR(RTRIM(requested_proc_desc), 1, 64) AS REQUESTED_PROC_DESC, CASE WHEN requested_proc_codes IS null THEN NVL(RTRIM(requested_proc_id), 'null') ELSE SUBSTR(sp_util.parse_string(RTRIM(requested_proc_codes), ':', 1), 1, 32) END AS REQUESTED_PROC_CODES, SUBSTR(RTRIM(requested_proc_priority), 1, 32) AS REQUESTED_PROC_PRIORITY, SUBSTR(RTRIM(requested_proc_reason), 1, 256) AS REQUESTED_PROC_REASON, SUBSTR(RTRIM(requested_proc_comments), 1, 4000) AS REQUESTED_PROC_COMMENTS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(study_instance_uid), 1, 64) AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, SUBSTR(RTRIM(proc_placer_order_no), 1, 32) AS PROC_PLACER_ORDER_NO, SUBSTR(RTRIM(proc_filler_order_no), 1, 32) AS PROC_FILLER_ORDER_NO, SUBSTR(RTRIM(accession_no), 1, 32) AS ACCESSION_NO, SUBSTR(RTRIM(attend_doctor), 1, 32) AS ATTEND_DOCTOR, SUBSTR(RTRIM(perform_doctor), 1, 32) AS PERFORM_DOCTOR, SUBSTR(RTRIM(consult_doctor), 1, 32) AS CONSULT_DOCTOR, NVL(NVL(SUBSTR(RTRIM(request_doctor), 1, 32), RTRIM(attend_doctor)), 'null') AS REQUEST_DOCTOR, SUBSTR(RTRIM(refer_doctor), 1, 32) AS REFER_DOCTOR, SUBSTR(RTRIM(request_department), 1, 32) AS REQUEST_DEPARTMENT, SUBSTR(RTRIM(imaging_request_reason), 1, 256) AS IMAGING_REQUEST_REASON, SUBSTR(RTRIM(imaging_request_comments), 1, 4000) AS IMAGING_REQUEST_COMMENTS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(imaging_request_dttm), 1, 14) AS IMAGING_REQUEST_DTTM, SUBSTR(RTRIM(isr_placer_order_no), 1, 32) AS ISR_PLACER_ORDER_NO, SUBSTR(RTRIM(isr_filler_order_no), 1, 32) AS ISR_FILLER_ORDER_NO, SUBSTR(RTRIM(admission_id), 1, 32) AS ADMISSION_ID, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_transport), 1, 32) AS PATIENT_TRANSPORT, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_location), 1, 32) AS PATIENT_LOCATION, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_residency), 1, 32) AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_name), 1, 64) AS PATIENT_NAME, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_id), 1, 32) AS PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(RTRIM(other_patient_name), 1, 64) AS OTHER_PATIENT_NAME, SUBSTR(RTRIM(other_patient_id), 1, 32) AS OTHER_PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_birth_date), 1, 8) AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DATE, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_sex), 1, 3) AS PATIENT_SEX, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_weight), 1, 16) AS PATIENT_WEIGHT, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_size), 1, 16) AS PATIENT_SIZE, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_state), 1, 32) AS PATIENT_STATE, 'Y' AS CONFIDENTIALITY, --NVL(SUBSTR(confidentiality, 1, 256), 'Y'), SUBSTR(RTRIM(pregnancy_status), 1, 256) AS PREGNANCY_STATUS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(medical_alerts), 1, 256) AS MEDICAL_ALERTS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(contrast_allergies), 1, 256) AS CONTRAST_ALLERGIES, SUBSTR(RTRIM(special_needs), 1, 32) AS SPECIAL_NEEDS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(specialty), 1, 32) AS SPECIALTY, SUBSTR(RTRIM(diagnosis), 1, 2048) AS DIAGNOSIS, SUBSTR(RTRIM(admit_dttm), 1, 14) AS ADMIT_DTTM, SUBSTR(RTRIM(register_dttm), 1, 14) AS REGISTER_DTTM --SUBSTR(RTRIM(study_ssn), 1, 64) AS STUDY_SSN, --SUBSTR(RTRIM(insurance_code), 1, 64) AS INSURANCE_CODE, --SUBSTR(RTRIM(emergency), 1, 8) AS EMERGENCY, --SUBSTR(RTRIM(special_doctor), 1, 32) AS SPECIAL_DOCTOR FROM mwlWl WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm
UPDATE mwlwl SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE mwl_key = #MWL_KEY

SELECT patientwl_key AS PATIENTWL_KEY, RTRIM(event_type) AS EVENT_TYPE, SUBSTR(patient_id, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(patient_name, 1, 64) AS PATIENT_NAME, SUBSTR(english_name, 1, 32) AS ENGLISH_NAME, SUBSTR(patient_ssn, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_SSN, SUBSTR(patient_birth_dttm, 1, 8) AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, SUBSTR(patient_sex, 1, 3) AS PATIENT_SEX, SUBSTR(patient_weight, 1, 8) AS PATIENT_WEIGHT, SUBSTR(patient_size, 1, 8) AS PATIENT_SIZE, SUBSTR(ethnic_group, 1, 32) AS ETHNIC_GROUP, SUBSTR(tel_no, 1, 32) AS TEL_NO, SUBSTR(fax_no, 1, 32) AS FAX_NO, SUBSTR(zipcode, 1, 16) AS ZIPCODE, SUBSTR(address, 1, 128) AS ADDRESS, SUBSTR(email, 1, 64) AS EMAIL, SUBSTR(blood_type, 1, 8) AS BLOOD_TYPE, SUBSTR(pregnancy_status, 1, 3) AS PREGNANCY_STATUS, SUBSTR(current_location, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_LOCATION, SUBSTR(current_residency, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_RESIDENCY, SUBSTR(current_department, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_DEPARTMENT, SUBSTR(current_doctor_id, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_DOCTOR_ID, SUBSTR(current_doctor_name, 1, 64) AS CURRENT_DOCTOR_NAME, SUBSTR(admit_dttm, 1, 14) AS ADMIT_DTTM, SUBSTR(discharge_dttm, 1, 14) AS DISCHARGE_DTTM FROM patientWl WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm
UPDATE patientwl SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE patientwl_key = #PATIENTWL_KEY

SELECT REPORTWL_KEY, exam_id AS EXAM_ID, patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, NVL(report_stat, 'F') AS REPORT_STAT, creator_id AS CREATOR_ID, creator_name AS CREATOR_NAME, create_dttm AS CREATE_DTTM, dictator_id AS DICTATOR_ID, dictator_name AS DICTATOR_NAME, dictate_dttm AS DICTATE_DTTM, transcriber_id AS TRANSCRIBER_ID, transcriber_name AS TRANSCRIBER_NAME, transcribe_dttm AS TRANSCRIBE_DTTM, approver_id AS APPROVER_ID, approver_name AS APPROVER_NAME, approve_dttm AS APPROVE_DTTM, reviser_id AS REVISER_ID, reviser_name AS REVISER_NAME, revise_dttm AS REVISE_DTTM, report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, report_text AS REPORT_TEXT, conclusion AS CONCLUSION FROM reportWl WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm
UPDATE reportwl SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE reportwl_key = #REPORTWL_KEY

SELECT user_key AS USER_KEY, SUBSTR(user_id, 1, 16) AS USER_ID, SUBSTR(user_name, 1, 64) AS USER_NAME, SUBSTR(password, 1, 128) AS PASSWORD, SUBSTR(user_level, 1, 16) AS USER_LEVEL, SUBSTR(user_status, 1, 16) AS USER_STATUS, comments AS COMMENTS FROM userWl WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm
UPDATE userwl SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE user_key = #USER_KEY

SELECT orm_key AS ORM_KEY, event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, SUBSTR(scheduled_date_time, 1, 14) AS SCHEDULED_DTTM, SUBSTR(diagnostic_serv_sect_id, 1, 8) AS SCHEDULED_MODALITY, SUBSTR(filler_field2, 1, 32) AS FILLER_FIELD2, SUBSTR(orm_field2, 1, 32) AS SCHEDULED_LOCATION, SUBSTR(filler_field1, 1, 32) AS SCHEDULED_PROC_ID, SUBSTR(specimen_source, 1, 64) AS SCHEDULED_PROC_DESC, SUBSTR(universal_service_id, 1, 256) AS SCHEDULED_ACTION_CODES, order_control_id AS ORDER_CONTROL_ID, CASE WHEN order_control_id = 'CA' THEN '0' ELSE '120' END AS SCHEDULED_PROC_STATUS, SUBSTR(placer_field2, 1, 32) AS REQUESTED_PROC_ID, sp_util.parse_string(universal_service_id, '^', 1) AS REQUESTED_PROC_CODES, sp_util.parse_string(universal_service_id, '^', 2) AS REQUESTED_PROC_DESC, SUBSTR(quantity_timing, 1, 32) AS REQUESTED_PROC_PRIORITY, reason_for_study AS REQUESTED_PROC_COMMENTS, SUBSTR(reference_pointer, 1, 64) AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, SUBSTR(placer_field1, 1, 32) AS ACCESSION_NO, SUBSTR(sp_util.parse_string(consulting_doctor_name, '^', 2), 1, 32) AS PERFORM_DOCTOR, NVL(sp_util.parse_string(orm_field2, '^', 2), 'IHE_Doc') AS REFER_DOCTOR, NVL(SUBSTR(sp_util.parse_string(attending_doctor_name, '^', 2), 1, 32) , NVL(sp_util.parse_string(orm_field2, '^', 2), 'IHE_Doc')) AS REQUEST_DOCTOR, SUBSTR(NVL(prior_patient_location, 'IHE'), 1, 32) AS REQUEST_DEPARTMENT, SUBSTR(request_dttm, 1, 14) AS IMAGING_REQUEST_DTTM, SUBSTR(orm_field1, 1, 32) AS ADMISSION_ID, SUBSTR(patient_class, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_LOCATION, SUBSTR(patient_residency, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, SUBSTR(patient_name, 1, 64) AS PATIENT_NAME, SUBSTR(patient_id, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(patient_ename, 1, 64) AS OTHER_PATIENT_NAME, SUBSTR(patient_ssn, 1, 32) AS OTHER_PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(patient_birth_dttm, 1, 8) AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DATE, SUBSTR(patient_sex, 1, 1) AS PATIENT_SEX, SUBSTR(specialty, 1, 32) AS SPECIALTY, diagnosis AS DIAGNOSIS, null AS CONFIDENTIALITY, null AS CONSULT_DOCTOR, null AS PROC_FILLER_ORDER_NO, null AS PROC_PLACER_ORDER_NO, null AS IMAGING_REQUEST_REASON, null AS IMAGING_REQUEST_COMMENTS, null AS ATTEND_DOCTOR, null AS REQUESTED_PROC_REASON, 'AE' AS SCHEDULED_AETITLE FROM ormQueue WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm

SELECT orm_key AS ORM_KEY, event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, message_control_id AS MESSAGE_CONTROL_ID, patient_account_no AS PATIENT_ACCOUNT_NO, patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, patient_ename AS PATIENT_ENAME, patient_ssn AS PATIENT_SSN, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_birth_dttm), 1, 8) AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, SUBSTR(RTRIM(patient_sex), 1, 3) AS PATIENT_SEX, refering_doctor_id AS REFERING_DOCTOR_ID, refering_doctor_name AS REFERING_DOCTOR_NAME, attending_doctor_id AS ATTENDING_DOCTOR_ID, attending_doctor_name AS ATTENDING_DOCTOR_NAME, prior_patient_location AS PRIOR_PATIENT_LOCATION, consulting_doctor_id AS CONSULTING_DOCTOR_ID, consulting_doctor_name AS CONSULTING_DOCTOR_NAME, patient_class AS PATIENT_CLASS, SUBSTR(scheduled_date_time, 1, 14) AS SCHEDULED_DATE_TIME, filler_order_no AS FILLER_ORDER_NO, quantity_timing AS QUANTITY_TIMING, order_control_id AS ORDER_CONTROL_ID, universal_service_id AS UNIVERSAL_SERVICE_ID, specimen_source AS SPECIMEN_SOURCE, diagnostic_serv_sect_id AS DIAGNOSTIC_SERV_SECT_ID, placer_field1 AS PLACER_FIELD1, placer_field2 AS PLACER_FIELD2, filler_field1 AS FILLER_FIELD1, filler_field2 AS FILLER_FIELD2, reason_for_study AS REASON_FOR_STUDY, entering_organization AS ENTERING_ORGANIZATION, reference_pointer AS REFERENCE_POINTER, request_dttm AS REQUEST_DTTM, specialty AS SPECIALTY, diagnosis AS DIAGNOSIS, patient_residency AS PATIENT_RESIDENCY, orm_field1 AS ORM_FIELD1, orm_field2 AS ORM_FIELD2, orm_field3 AS ORM_FIELD3, orm_field4 AS ORM_FIELD4, orm_field5 AS ORM_FIELD5, orm_field6 AS ORM_FIELD6, orm_field7 AS ORM_FIELD7, orm_field8 AS ORM_FIELD8, orm_field9 AS ORM_FIELD9, orm_field10 AS ORM_FIELD10 FROM ormQueue WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm
UPDATE ormqueue SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE orm_key = #ORM_KEY

SELECT SUBSTR(event_type, 1, 32) AS EVENT_TYPE, SUBSTR(patient_account_no, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_ACCOUNT_NO, SUBSTR(patient_id, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(prior_patient_id, 1, 64) AS PRIOR_PATIENT_ID, SUBSTR(patient_name, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_NAME, SUBSTR(patient_ename, 1, 32) AS ENGLISH_NAME, SUBSTR(patient_ssn, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_SSN, SUBSTR(patient_birth_dttm, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, SUBSTR(patient_sex, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_SEX, SUBSTR(patient_weight, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_WEIGHT, SUBSTR(patient_size, 1, 32) AS PATIENT_SIZE, SUBSTR(patient_ethnic_group, 1, 32) AS ETHNIC_GROUP, SUBSTR(patient_phone_no, 1, 32) AS TEL_NO, SUBSTR(patient_fax_no, 1, 32) AS FAX_NO, SUBSTR(patient_zipcode, 1, 32) AS ZIPCODE, SUBSTR(patient_address, 1, 32) AS ADDRESS, SUBSTR(patient_email, 1, 32) AS EMAIL, SUBSTR(patient_blood_type, 1, 32) AS BLOOD_TYPE, SUBSTR(patient_pregnancy_status, 1, 32) AS PREGNANCY_STATUS, SUBSTR(patient_class, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_LOCATION, SUBSTR(patient_location, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_RESIDENCY, SUBSTR(prior_patient_location, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_DEPARTMENT, SUBSTR(current_doctor_id, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_DOCTOR_ID, SUBSTR(current_doctor_name, 1, 32) AS CURRENT_DOCTOR_NAME, null AS ADMIT_DTTM, null AS DISCHARGE_DTTM, SUBSTR(adt_field1, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD1, SUBSTR(adt_field2, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD2, SUBSTR(adt_field3, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD3, SUBSTR(adt_field4, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD4, SUBSTR(adt_field5, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD5, SUBSTR(adt_field6, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD6, SUBSTR(adt_field7, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD7, SUBSTR(adt_field8, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD8, SUBSTR(adt_field9, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD9, SUBSTR(adt_field10, 1, 128) AS ADT_FIELD10 FROM adtQueue WHERE replica_dttm = 'ANY' ORDER BY trigger_dttm
UPDATE adtqueue SET replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE adt_key = #ADT_KEY

SELECT q.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.match_stat AS MATCH_STAT, p.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, to_char(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.modalities AS MODALITIES, s.department AS DEPARTMENT, st.station_name AS STATION_NAME, s.source_aetitle AS SOURCE_AETITLE, m.sps_location AS SPS_LOCATION, to_char(m.sps_start_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SPS_START_DTTM, v.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, to_char(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, s.study_desc AS STUDY_DESC, s.bodyparts AS BODYPARTS, m.sps_stat AS SPS_STAT, m.sps_id AS SPS_ID, m.sps_comments AS SPS_COMMENTS, p.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, p.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, v.visit_no AS VISIT_NO, NVL(s.series_count, 0) AS SERIES_COUNT, NVL(s.instance_count, 0) AS INSTANCE_COUNT FROM study s, msps m, patient p, iOrder i, visit v, station st, (SELECT routeitem_key, object_key, match_stat FROM (SELECT /*+ rule */ i.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, i.object_key AS OBJECT_KEY, CASE WHEN s.validate_dttm IS NOT NULL AND s.order_key IS NOT NULL AND s.series_count > 0 AND s.instance_count > 0 THEN 'M' ELSE 'U' END AS MATCH_STAT FROM hl7routeItem i, hl7station st, study s, iOrder o WHERE i.dst_station_key = st.station_key AND i.route_stat = 'N' AND i.message_type = 'ORM' AND i.EVENT_TYPE IN ('CM', 'MP', 'UM', 'SC', 'CA') AND i.object_key = s.study_key(+) AND s.order_key = o.order_key(+) ORDER BY i.trigger_dttm ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE q.match_stat = 'M' AND s.study_key = q.object_key AND m.study_key = s.study_key AND s.patient_id = p.patient_id AND s.order_key = i.order_key AND p.patient_key = i.patient_key AND i.visit_key = v.visit_key(+) AND m.station_key = st.station_key AND s.validate_dttm IS NOT NULL

SELECT p.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, i.filler_order_id AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_key AS STUDY_KEY, s.modalities AS MODALITIES, s.request_department AS DEPARTMENT, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, st.station_name AS STATION_NAME, m.sps_location AS SPS_LOCATION, to_char(m.sps_start_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SPS_START_DTTM, v.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, to_char(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, m.sps_stat AS SPS_STAT, m.sps_id AS SPS_ID, m.sps_comments AS SPS_COMMENTS, p.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, p.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, v.visit_no AS VISIT_NO FROM study s, msps m, patient p, iOrder i, visit v, station st, (SELECT routeitem_key, study_instance_uid, match_stat FROM (SELECT /*+ rule */ i.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, CASE WHEN s.validate_dttm IS NOT NULL AND s.order_key IS NOT NULL AND s.series_count > 0 AND s.instance_count > 0 THEN 'M' ELSE 'U' END AS MATCH_STAT FROM hl7routeItem i, hl7station st, study s, iOrder o WHERE i.dst_station_key = st.station_key AND i.route_stat = 'N' AND i.message_type = 'ORM' AND i.EVENT_TYPE IN ('CM', 'MP', 'UM', 'SC', 'CA') AND s.order_key = o.order_key(+) ORDER BY i.trigger_dttm ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE q.match_stat = 'U' AND s.study_instance_uid = q.study_instance_uid AND m.study_key = s.study_key AND s.patient_id = p.patient_id AND s.order_key = i.order_key AND p.patient_key = i.patient_key AND i.visit_key = v.visit_key(+) AND m.station_key = st.station_key
UPDATE hl7routeitem SET route_stat = 'Y', replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE routeitem_key = @ROUTEITEM_KEY
UPDATE hl7routeitem SET route_stat = CASE WHEN NVL(retry_count, 0) >= 2 THEN 'E' ELSE 'N' END, retry_count = NVL(retry_count, 0) + 1, replica_dttm = SYSDATE WHERE routeitem_key = @ROUTEITEM_KEY

SELECT q.routeitem_key AS ROUTEITEM_KEY, q.message_type AS MESSAGE_TYPE, q.event_type AS EVENT_TYPE, q.object_type AS OBJECT_TYPE, q.retry_count AS RETRY_COUNT, r.report_key AS REPORT_KEY, s.patient_id AS PATIENT_ID, s.access_no AS ACCESS_NO, s.study_instance_uid AS STUDY_INSTANCE_UID, s.study_stat AS STUDY_STAT, s.addendum_stat AS ADDENDUM_STAT, c.userid AS CREATE_USERID, c.user_name AS CREATE_USERNAME, to_char(r.create_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS CREATE_DTTM, d.userid AS DICTATE_USERID, d.user_name AS DICTATE_USERNAME, to_char(r.dictate_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS DICTATE_DTTM, t.userid AS TRANSCRIBE_USERID, t.user_name AS TRANCRIBE_USERNAME, to_char(r.transcribe_dttm,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS TRANSCRIBE_DTTM, a.userid AS APPROVE_USERID, a.user_name AS APPROVE_USERNAME, to_char(r.approval_dttm,'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS APPROVE_DTTM, v.userid AS REVISE_USERID, v.user_name AS REVISE_USERNAME, to_char(r.revision_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REVISE_DTTM, r.report_type AS REPORT_TYPE, NVL(DBMS_LOB.GETLENGTH(r.report_text_lob), 0) AS REPORT_TEXT, r.conclusion AS CONCLUSION, to_char(s.study_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS STUDY_DTTM, s.institution AS INSTITUTION, s.department AS DEPARTMENT, s.modalities AS MODALITIES, to_char(s.request_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REQUEST_DTTM, s.request_name AS REQUEST_NAME, s.request_code AS REQUEST_CODE, s.request_doctor AS REQUEST_DOCTOR, s.perform_doctor AS PERFORM_DOCTOR, s.refer_doctor AS REFER_DOCTOR, to_char(m.sps_start_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS SPS_START_DTTM, s.patient_name AS PATIENT_NAME, s.patient_sex AS PATIENT_SEX, to_char(s.patient_birth_dttm, 'YYYYMMDD') AS PATIENT_BIRTH_DTTM, s.study_id AS SPS_ID, s.study_comments AS STUDY_COMMENTS, s.study_reason AS STUDY_REASON, s.operators AS OPERATORS, s.patient_location AS PATIENT_LOCATION, s.source_aetitle AS AETITLE, r.alink_key AS ALINK_KEY, m.sps_location AS SPS_LOCATION -- r.digital_sign_flag AS DIGITAL_SIGN_FLAG, -- r.digital_sign_data AS DIGITAL_SIGN_DATA, -- r.digital_sign_dttm AS DIGITAL_SIGN_DTTM, -- r.certificate_dn AS CERTIFICATE_DN, -- r.digital_sign_key AS DIGITAL_SIGN_KEY FROM report r, study s, users c, users d, users t, users a, users v, msps m, (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, object_key, event_type, object_type, retry_count FROM (SELECT routeitem_key, message_type, event_type, object_type, object_key, NVL(retry_count, 0) AS RETRY_COUNT FROM hl7routeItem WHERE message_type = 'ORU' AND route_stat = 'N' AND object_type in ('R', 'A') AND NVL(retry_count, 0) <= 2 ORDER BY routeitem_key ASC) WHERE rownum < 1000) q WHERE r.report_key IN q.object_key AND s.study_key = r.study_key AND r.study_key = m.study_key AND s.study_stat > 200 AND r.creator_key = c.user_key(+) AND r.dictator_key = d.user_key(+) AND r.transcriber_key = t.user_key(+) AND r.approver_key = a.user_key(+) AND r.reviser_key = v.user_key(+)

SELECT rownum rn, q.* FROM (SELECT que_id, flag_ebiw, flag_cu, institution_code, facility_code, hospital_code, patient_id, patient_name, patient_dob, patient_sex, patient_age, patient_weight, patient_size, surgery_scheduled_dttm, anesthesia_type, surgery_sequence, department_code, department_name, surgery_description, surgery_room_code, surgery_room_name, surgery_type, anesthesia_start_dttm, anesthesia_end_dttm, anesthesia_total_time, anesthesiologist_1, anesthesiologist_2, anesthesiologist_3, surgery_start_dttm, surgery_end_dttm, operating_surgeon_1, operating_surgeon_2, operating_surgeon_3, asa, emergency, emr_key, room_type, bed_number, room_in_dttm, room_out_dttm, combined_surgery, upper_room_code, icu_room_code, icu_in_dttm, icu_out_dttm FROM que_in_vital WHERE flag_ebiw = 'Y' AND flag_cu = 'N' AND room_type = 'O' AND surgery_room_code IS NOT NULL AND anesthesia_start_dttm IS NOT NULL AND anesthesia_end_dttm IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(rgs_dt, 'dd') <= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'dd') - 2 ORDER BY que_id ASC) q WHERE rownum < 10000

SELECT rownum rn, q.* FROM (SELECT que_id, flag_ebiw, flag_cu, institution_code, facility_code, hospital_code, patient_id, patient_name, patient_dob, patient_sex, patient_age, patient_weight, patient_size, surgery_scheduled_dttm, anesthesia_type, surgery_sequence, department_code, department_name, surgery_description, surgery_room_code, surgery_room_name, surgery_type, anesthesia_start_dttm, anesthesia_end_dttm, anesthesia_total_time, anesthesiologist_1, anesthesiologist_2, anesthesiologist_3, surgery_start_dttm, surgery_end_dttm, operating_surgeon_1, operating_surgeon_2, operating_surgeon_3, asa, emergency, emr_key, room_type, bed_number, room_in_dttm, room_out_dttm, combined_surgery, upper_room_code, icu_room_code, icu_in_dttm, icu_out_dttm FROM que_in_vital WHERE flag_ebiw = 'Y' AND flag_cu = 'N' AND room_type = 'R' AND bed_number IS NOT NULL AND room_in_dttm IS NOT NULL AND room_out_dttm IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(rgs_dt, 'dd') <= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'dd') - 2 ORDER BY que_id ASC) q WHERE rownum < 10000

SELECT rownum rn, q.* FROM (SELECT que_id, flag_ebiw, flag_cu, institution_code, facility_code, hospital_code, patient_id, patient_name, patient_dob, patient_sex, patient_age, patient_weight, patient_size, surgery_scheduled_dttm, anesthesia_type, surgery_sequence, department_code, department_name, surgery_description, surgery_room_code, surgery_room_name, surgery_type, anesthesia_start_dttm, anesthesia_end_dttm, anesthesia_total_time, anesthesiologist_1, anesthesiologist_2, anesthesiologist_3, surgery_start_dttm, surgery_end_dttm, operating_surgeon_1, operating_surgeon_2, operating_surgeon_3, asa, emergency, emr_key, room_type, bed_number, room_in_dttm, room_out_dttm, combined_surgery, upper_room_code, icu_room_code, icu_in_dttm, CASE -- Do not change the WHEN order below : If the icu_out_dttm is two days ago, register as ICU_OUT_DTTM WHEN icu_out_dttm IS null THEN null WHEN TRUNC(TO_DATE(icu_out_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'DD') >= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'DD') - 1 THEN null WHEN TRUNC(TO_DATE(icu_out_dttm, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'DD') <= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'DD') - 2 THEN icu_out_dttm END AS icu_out_dttm FROM que_in_vital WHERE flag_ebiw = 'Y' AND flag_cu = 'N' AND room_type = 'I' AND icu_room_code IS NOT NULL AND icu_in_dttm IS NOT NULL AND TRUNC(rgs_dt, 'DD') <= TRUNC(SYSDATE, 'DD') - 2 ORDER BY que_id ASC) q WHERE rownum < 10000
UPDATE que_in_vital SET flag_cu = 'Y' WHERE que_id = @QUE_ID
UPDATE que_in_vital SET flag_cu = 'E' WHERE que_id = @QUE_ID
UPDATE que_in_vital SET flag_cu = CASE WHEN @ICU_OUT_DTTM IS null THEN 'N' -- Reuse queue until ICU_OUT_DTTM is registered ELSE 'Y' END WHERE que_id = @QUE_ID

SELECT q.id AS QUEID, q.flag AS QUEFLAG, r.ID AS REPORTKEY, e.id AS examkey, r.rstatus, r.pathdict, r.transdate, r.transtime, t.username AS TYPISTNM, reportdate, reporttime, r1.username AS READDR1NM, r2.username AS READDR2NM, r3.username AS READDR3NM, r4.username AS READDR4NM, confdate, conftime, c1.username AS CONFDR1NM, c2.username AS CONFDR2NM, c3.username AS CONFDR3NM, c4.username AS CONFDR4NM, r.postdate,r.posttime, r.specialreading, r.readdr1, r.readdr2, r.readdr3, r.readdr4, r.confdr1, r.confdr2, r.confdr3, r.confdr4, r.typist, r.chiefdr, r.suitable, re.clo, re.pol, re.biopsy, re.clostatus, r.multinum, r.typingdate, r.typingtime, e.addendum, (SELECT xmlagg(xmlelement(a,''||TEXTVALUE) ORDER BY TLINENO).EXTRACT('//text()').GETCLOBVAL() AS text FROM dText where dreport=r.id and itemname = '1' GROUP BY DREPORT) AS FINDING, (SELECT xmlagg(xmlelement(a,''||TEXTVALUE) ORDER BY TLINENO).EXTRACT('//text()').GETCLOBVAL() AS text FROM dText where dreport=r.id and itemname = '2' GROUP BY DREPORT) AS CONCLUSION, (SELECT xmlagg(xmlelement(a,''||TEXTVALUE) ORDER BY TLINENO).EXTRACT('//text()').GETCLOBVAL() AS text FROM dText where dreport=r.id and itemname = '3' GROUP BY DREPORT) AS RECOMMEND, e.dorder, e.dreport, e.patid, e.estatus, e.examdate, e.examtime, e.sectcode, e.modality, e.machine, o.hisorderid, o.opdeptid, o.opdept, o.orderfrom, e.serialno, e.verifier FROM dReport r, mUser t, mUser r1, mUser r2, mUser r3, mUser r4, mUser c1, mUser c2, mUser c3, mUser c4, dReportEndo re, dExam e, dOrder o, (SELECT id, dexam, flag FROM queueReport q WHERE q.flag IN ('R','M','U') ORDER BY id ASC) q WHERE e.id in q.dexam AND r.id = re.dreport(+) AND e.DREPORT = r.ID(+) AND e.DORDER = o.ID(+) AND r.typist = t.userid(+) AND r.readdr1 = r1.userid(+) AND r.readdr2 = r2.userid(+) AND r.readdr3 = r3.userid(+) AND r.readdr4 = r4.userid(+) AND r.confdr1 = c1.userid(+) AND r.confdr2 = c2.userid(+) AND r.confdr3 = c3.userid(+) AND r.confdr4 = c4.userid(+) ORDER BY q.id ASC
SELECT 1 AS ONE FROM DUAL
SELECT 1 AS ONE FROM DUAL

SELECT se.svc_cd AS SVC_CD, se.inu_cd AS INU_CD, i.inu_nm AS INU_NM, se.faclt_cd AS FACLT_CD, f.faclt_nm AS FACLT_NM, se.sys_cd AS SYS_CD, sy.sys_nm AS SYS_NM FROM instMst i, facilityMst f, sysMst sy, service se WHERE se.inu_cd = i.inu_cd AND se.faclt_cd = f.faclt_cd AND se.sys_cd = sy.sys_cd AND se.act_stat = 'V' AND se.faclt_cd = sy.faclt_cd ORDER BY se.svc_cd ASC
SELECT cntt_catg_key, cntt_catg_nm FROM contentCatg WHERE inu_cd = @INSTITUTION_CODE AND faclt_cd = @FACILITY_CODE AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT cntt_catg_typ_key, cntt_catg_typ_nm FROM contentType WHERE cntt_catg_key = @CNTT_CATG_KEY AND use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT mime_typ_grp_key, mime_typ_grp_nm FROM mimeTypeGroup ORDER BY mime_typ_grp_nm ASC
SELECT mime_typ_key, mime_file_ex, mime_typ, mime_desc FROM mimeType WHERE mime_typ_grp_key = @MIME_TYP_GRP_KEY ORDER BY mime_file_ex ASC
SELECT inter_http FROM stationMst WHERE svc_cd = @SERVICE_CODE AND prod_key = (SELECT prod_key FROM productMst WHERE prod_nm = 'CONTENTUPLOADER') AND use_yn = 'Y' AND rownum = 1
SELECT p.pf_val AS PF_VAL FROM sysProfileMst pm, sysProfile p WHERE pm.pf_key = p.pf_key AND pm.pf_sec = 'SECURITY' AND pm.pf_entry = 'AUTHORIZATION_SERVER_HTTP_BASE_URL' AND pm.pf_lv = 'IHP'
